Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Indian Summer

Video.summary: Bob paints snowy peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Summit

Video.summary: Bob uses color to create realistic waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Emerald Waters

Video.summary: Bob paints a quiet brook in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: Bob paints a brook in a colorful landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Brook

Video.summary: Firs front rugged peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Exhibition

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint a wintry scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin at Trail's End

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints within an outline of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Florida's Glory

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene seascape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: By the Sea

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Rhapsody

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Little Home in the Meadow

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frozen Solitude

Video.summary: Bob paints a restful scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Peaceful Haven

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain View

Video.summary: Bare trees darken an isolated creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Creek

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene lake and distant hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rolling Hills

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil beach scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rowboat on the Beach

Video.summary: Fading light shrouds a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a calm mountain lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mirrored Images

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert site within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Glow

Video.summary: A playful brook complements a range of rugged mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Mountain Brook

Video.summary: Bob paints a rocky mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lone Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints an autumnal valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pretty Autumn Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin in frigid mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Teton Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints tall, smooth falls.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Graceful Waterfall

Video.summary: Bob paints a pond amid dense foliage.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wayside Pond

Video.summary: A wilderness path leads to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob accents with an abundance of trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterside Way

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross uses a lot of color in a depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a forest trail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Back-Country Path

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter landscape within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Icy Lake

Video.summary: Bob's use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to a woodside setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hunter's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Bob highlights a snowy scene with blue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lonely Retreat

Video.summary: Bob paints an orange sun over a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Warm Winter Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Bob paints sky, stream and snowy peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Gray Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints firs, peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Portrait of Winter
